docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, DATE REQUESTED IS 7/29/99 AT 3:30 PM.
THIS IS NOT AN AMENDED JUDGMENT. AMENDED ONLY FOR THE PURPOSE OF RENDERING JUDGMENT IN COMPUTER.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,100.00 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, MARILLIE AS TO DEFENDANT NIELSEN, CARL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION CORRECT JUDGMENT. OF OCT-21-1999, GRANTED
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NIELSEN, CARL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, MARILLIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIELSEN, CARL $3,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,120.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, MARILLIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIELSEN, CARL $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,270.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFTS'S DECL:COMMISSIONER WROTE HIM A LETTER W/REG ARDS HIS LETTER ON JUDGMENT ERROR,SENT HIM SC-108 FORM(YELLOW)TO FILE FOR REVIEW.
NOTE:DEFT.FILING MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION AS TOL D BY THE COMM; PAID $14 CASH,TOLD TO WAIT AT LEAST 15 DAYS,FOLDER TO NORA.
